'''kazhoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:grabbler|grabbler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:grabbler|grabbler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kazhoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæzheyeth|kæzheyeth]] || [[word:kæzheyej|kæzheyej]] || [[word:kæzheyesh|kæzheyesh]] || [[word:kæzheye|kæzheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazhozhoyoth|kazhozhoyoth]] || [[word:kazhozhoyoj|kazhozhoyoj]] || [[word:kazhozhoyosh|kazhozhoyosh]] || [[word:kazhozhoyo|kazhozhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazhoyoth|kazhoyoth]] || [[word:kazhoyoj|kazhoyoj]] || [[word:kazhoyosh|kazhoyosh]] || [[word:kazhoyo|kazhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazhofyoth|kazhofyoth]] || [[word:kazhofyoj|kazhofyoj]] || [[word:kazhofyosh|kazhofyosh]] || [[word:kazhofyof|kazhofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kazhoyotho|kazhoyotho]] || [[word:kazhoyojo|kazhoyojo]] || [[word:kazhoyosho|kazhoyosho]] || [[word:kazhoyoko|kazhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kazhoyoth|kazhoyoth]] || [[word:kazhoyoj|kazhoyoj]] || [[word:kazhoyosh|kazhoyosh]] || [[word:kazhoyo|kazhoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kazhoyothol|kazhoyothol]] || [[word:kazhoyojol|kazhoyojol]] || [[word:kazhoyoshol|kazhoyoshol]] || [[word:kazhoyokol|kazhoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kazhoyothotho|kazhoyothotho]] || [[word:kazhoyojojo|kazhoyojojo]] || [[word:kazhoyoshosho|kazhoyoshosho]] || [[word:kazhoyoko|kazhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kazhoyothon|kazhoyothon]] || [[word:kazhoyojon|kazhoyojon]] || [[word:kazhoyoshon|kazhoyoshon]] || [[word:kazhoyokon|kazhoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kazhoyothoro|kazhoyothoro]] || [[word:kazhoyojoro|kazhoyojoro]] || [[word:kazhoyoshoro|kazhoyoshoro]] || [[word:kazhoyokoro|kazhoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
